char_overview: A former nun who carries both healing and judgment into battle. Her prayer-type abilities anchor the squad: mending wounds, shielding minds, and binding enemies in chains.
char_looks: Long golden hair. Blue eyes, gentle and resolute. Deep blue nun's habit, white thigh-high socks, white leather boots. None, uses 灵力回路 for combat
char_flaws: Will not bend a rule, no matter the cost.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-掌灯人: A lantern created by 灵力 that dispels negative effects, applies minor healing, and enhances mental resilience of allies within its light. Its chain can bind and restrain enemies.
char_mission: Treat every patient as a doctor and protect her teammates with her abilities.
